name: GOOFY Cafe & Dine
tagline: Farm-to-table Hawaiian cafe near Ala Moana — acai bowls, loco moco with local beef, and a surfer-chic vibe.
mustOrder: acai bowl with local honey and granola
loco moco with Big Island grass-fed beef
parking: Street parking on Ala Moana Blvd; paid lots nearby
bestTime: Breakfast before 9am to beat the crowd. Great post-surf or post-beach refuel
talkStory: GOOFY Cafe leans hard into the locavore movement — they source from over 20 Hawaii farms and make everything in-house. The acai bowls and smoothies are what draw people in, but the hot food (loco moco, eggs benedict, curry plates) is what keeps locals coming back. The space has a casual surf-culture vibe near Ala Moana. Solid option for health-conscious eaters who still want flavor.
